prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The sequence begins with a graphic/product-style frame: a smiling woman holding bright pink flowers appears on the right, while a purple panel on the left shows an Allegra-D 24 Hour product box and text including “Visit Allegra.com,” “Allergy & Congestion,” and “STOP SUFFERING START BREATHING.” Small print at the bottom mentions pharmacy-counter availability.

It then cuts abruptly to a snowy mountain resort setting. A round outdoor hot tub sits on a deck surrounded by snow, evergreen trees, ski equipment, and distant snow-covered mountains. Several people are in and around the tub.

The focus shifts to three people in the hot tub: a bare-shouldered man in the center with ski goggles around his neck, flanked closely by two women in swimwear. The woman on the left wears ski goggles and a purple bikini top; the woman on the right wears a white knit hat and a pink bikini top. They are smiling or looking toward one another against the snowy mountain backdrop.

A wider shot shows the man surrounded by multiple women in the hot tub. Two red personal-care product containers are visible on the hot tub edge in front of him. The snowy alpine setting remains prominent in the background.

The next close-up highlights the red products more clearly, held or positioned near the man’s chest. One appears to be a tall bottle, and the other a shorter stick-shaped container, both with dark labels. The man is centered between the two women; the woman in the white hat looks down with an open-mouthed reaction, while the woman in goggles looks toward the products/man.

A side close-up shows the man leaning near the woman in the white hat. She looks downward with a reserved or neutral expression. The snowy rocks/background remain visible but blurred.

Another shot shows the man facing the woman in the white hat while making a small hand gesture near his chest. The woman in goggles smiles in the background, and a red product container is visible at the left edge of the frame.

The final scene changes to a clean, pale/white product display setting. Large white pixelated text reads: “SMELL LIKE A MAN FROM HEAD TO TOES.” A plus sign appears between two red products: a tall bottle on the left and a shorter stick container on the right.

In the last frame, the product display becomes more surreal: a man’s head lies next to the tall red bottle on the left, while a foot and lower leg with a metallic/mechanical-looking attachment lie next to the shorter red container on the right. The same text, “SMELL LIKE A MAN FROM HEAD TO TOES,” remains above, with the plus sign between the two products.
